 being a 4 cylinder it’s amazing on gas about 32 mpg if driven right great for a first time driving or a gas saving commuter   
   
 No oil leaks or water no weird noises coming from the engine or suspension it no shaking on the freeway drives straight and smooth   
   
 It’s been well taken care of It’s a non-smoker no pet hair It’s very clean inside and out never no children inside the car so it’s clean inside seats are half leather and suede with   
   
 Only issues is that there is few scratches and dings other then at it’s in excellent condition   
   
 Everything works in the car cold AC strong heater all power windows work radio Bluetooth etc   
   
 It’s never been in an accident never repainted the car is all original

**2007 Toyota Camry SE – Sport Edition | Sunroof | Clean | Reliable | Great MPG**   
  
 Selling my **2007 Toyota Camry SE Sport Edition** in excellent condition. This car has been well maintained, is extremely reliable, and runs great. Perfect daily driver with plenty of life left.   
  
 **Details**

* 218,000 miles
* Automatic transmission
* 4-cylinder engine – great gas mileage (~21 city / 30 highway)
* Clean title
* Non-smoker, no pets
* Silver exterior

**Maintenance & Condition**

* Regular oil changes every 3,000 miles (last done Nov 2025)
* No warning lights — runs and drives perfectly
* New catalytic converter (Nov 2025)
* Smog check passed (Nov 2025)
* New A/C compressor and belts (Dec 2025)
* New alternator (Jan 2026)
* New engine & cabin air filters and windshield wipers (Feb 2026)

**Features**

* Sunroof
* Power driver seat
* Cruise control
* Cold A/C & strong heat
* Power windows, locks, and mirrors
* Tilt & telescoping steering wheel
* Steering-wheel audio controls
* Sportier suspension and styling
* Spacious, comfortable interior

**Notes**

* A few minor scratches from normal wear and tear
* Mechanically solid and ready to drive

**Price:** **$4,999** or best reasonable offer   
  
 **Recently reduced for a quick sale.** Comparable Camrys are listed higher, but I’m motivated and ready to make a deal. Open to fair offers after viewing the car in person.   
  
 **Clean title in hand.** Test drives welcome. First serious buyer takes it.
